title: Cinematic Hotbar
description: Mod that make it so when you don't click on your mouse or you are not hit , the hud will dissapear but not the hands
body:
This mod is very simple, it make it possible to disable hud without the hands when you are not hurt or if you don't click on your mouse for 5 seconds.
Whenever you do one of those it will make that the hud appear again.

F1 part of the mod is heavily inspired by the [Better F1 mod](https://github.com/UltimateBoomer/mc-betterf1/) by UltimateBoomer ! 


## *What's new ?*

~~*Now you have a more cleaner animation when the hotbar fade in and fade out. the timing can be changed in the config menu , that can be accessed using V by default or in the mod menu page.*~~
